title: gladiolus pubescifolius
intro: Gladiolus pubescifolius, also known as the hairy-leaved gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It has medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus pubescifolius include reducing coughs and congestion, as well as providing relief from fever and other flu-like symptoms. The herbal preparations of Gladiolus pubescifolius typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
